zh.lifeSummary: 當Idonea Comyn於1148年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，她的父親Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale33歲，母親Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl26歲。她於1172年與Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾阿爾爾 豪斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1232年享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Idonea Comyn于1148年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，她的父亲Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale33岁，母亲Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl26岁。她于1172年与Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight在苏格兰艾爾金爾阿爾爾 豪斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1232年享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Idonea
meanings: An old baptismal name derived from Latin idoneus, fit, meet, proper.

en.lifeSummary: When Idonea Comyn was born in 1148, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale, was 33 and her mother, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, was 26. She married Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight in 1172, in Altyre House, Elginshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1232, at the age of 84.

fr.Castle Moulin, East Lothian, Scotland: Castle, Jackson, Dakota du Sud, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Idonea Comyn est née en 1148, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight en 1172, à Altyre House, Elginshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1232, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.Castle Moulin, East Lothian, Scotland: Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Idonea Comyn 1148 in Moray, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale 33 und ihre Mutter Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl 26. Sie hat 1172 in Altyre House, Elginshire, Scotland Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1232 im Alter von 84 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Idonea Comynが1148年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedaleは33歳，母Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Athollは26歳であった。1172年にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアアルトイア ホーウゼでSir Adam FitzGilbert, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1232年に84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Idonea Comyn(이)가 1148년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1172년 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 알티어 허스에서 Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1232년 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Idonea Comyn родилась в 1148 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam FitzGilbert, Knight в 1172 г. в местности алтир хоус, элгиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1232 г. в возрасте 84 лет.
